zh: 於 dTV 獨家播出的《銀魂 THE SEMI-FINAL》萬事屋篇劇情簡介與先行畫面已經公開，預告影片也一併釋出。《銀魂 THE SEMI-FINAL》將由 1 月 15 日 19 點起播出的萬事屋篇，以及 16 日 19 點起播出的真選組篇兩集構成，是 1 月 8 日上映的電影《銀魂 THE FINAL》的前傳。
ja: dTVにて独占配信される「銀魂 THE SEMI-FINAL」の万事屋篇あらすじと先行カットが公開、さらに予告動画も到着した。「銀魂 THE SEMI-FINAL」は、1月15日19時からの万事屋篇・16日19時から真選組篇の2話構成で、1月8日から公開の映画「銀魂 THE FINAL」の前日譚。
en: The synopsis and preview screenshots for the Yorozuya arc of "Gintama The Semi-Final," distributed exclusively on dTV, have been released, along with a trailer. Composed of two episodes—the Yorozuya arc airing on January 15th at 7 PM, and the Shinsengumi arc on January 16th at 7 PM—"Gintama The Semi-Final" serves as a prequel to the movie "Gintama THE FINAL," which premiered on January 8th.
